/usr/bin/c++  -Wall -Wextra -Wpedantic -g --coverage CMakeFiles/networking_tests.dir/test_p2pnode.cpp.o CMakeFiles/networking_tests.dir/test_protocol.cpp.o CMakeFiles/networking_tests.dir/test_events.cpp.o CMakeFiles/networking_tests.dir/test_replication.cpp.o CMakeFiles/networking_tests.dir/__/python/nimcp_module.c.o -o networking_tests  -Wl,-rpath,/home/bbrelin/src/repos/nimcp/bin ../../../bin/libnimcp.so.2.5.0 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libpython3.10.so -lpthread -llz4 -ljansson /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libgtest_main.a /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libgtest.a
